global.title: East African ministers to unveil budgets amid Iran cost shocks, debt strains - TradingView
global.summary: East African governments are preparing budgets under pressure from higher energy costs tied to the Iran conflict and ongoing debt strain.
global.whyItMatters: Rising costs and instability hit vulnerable families first; this is useful context for prayer, missions awareness, and preaching on economic justice.

global.title: The Bulletin: June 11’s News in 60 seconds - Newsweek
global.summary: Newsweek reports the U.S. and Iran exchanged fire again Thursday, signaling that the recent ceasefire is fraying rather than holding.
global.whyItMatters: Fresh escalation in the Middle East affects global anxiety, fuel prices, and congregational concern; pastors may need wise, non-alarmist framing.

global.title: Elon Musk’s SpaceX is about to make its debut on Wall Street - AP News
global.summary: SpaceX is set to begin trading Friday in a major public debut that could further expand Musk’s influence across technology, communications, and space infrastructure.
global.whyItMatters: This is a cultural and economic power story, helpful for thinking about wealth, influence, and the moral formation of a tech-shaped society.

canadian.title: Canada seeks to ban social media accounts for children under 16, joining growing global effort - AP News
canadian.summary: Canada introduced legislation that could bar children under 16 from social media unless platforms prove they can keep young users safe.
canadian.whyItMatters: This directly touches parenting, youth ministry, discipleship, and digital formation in Canadian churches.

persecutedChurch.title: Christian leaders hold emergency summit in Jerusalem to confront global rise in antisemitism - Fox News
persecutedChurch.summary: Christian leaders gathered in Jerusalem for an emergency summit focused on rising antisemitism and the challenge of responding with theological clarity and public witness.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: It highlights growing pressure around faith, identity, and public teaching; pastors may want to address antisemitism carefully and biblically.

persecutedChurch.title: US and European Christian leaders arrive in Israel on solidarity trip amid Iran conflict - Ynetnews
persecutedChurch.summary: A delegation of Christian leaders from the U.S. and Europe arrived in Israel to meet officials, receive briefings, and strengthen advocacy during the Iran conflict.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This shows how global church relationships are being shaped by conflict, solidarity, and public witness in a volatile region.

leadership.title: The Manager–Employee Gap: Why Leaders Stopped Eating Last - SHRM
leadership.summary: SHRM argues that trust erodes when leaders become structurally distant from their people, especially amid hybrid work, AI disruption, and recurring layoffs.
leadership.whyItMatters: A timely reminder for church leadership: presence, sacrifice, and relational trust still matter more than efficiency alone.

goodNews.title: Dog rescued after drifting out to sea in a kayak due to strong winds - NBC New York
goodNews.summary: A missing dog was safely rescued after drifting out to sea in a kayak, with boat crew video capturing the moment help arrived.
goodNews.whyItMatters: A small story of rescue and relief can offer a welcome note of grace and shared joy in a heavy news cycle.
